description: CompositionBlack sweatshirt made of 100% cotton, has a hood with woven cotton drawstrings, short sleeves up to the elbows with a broad, flat knit band at the cuffs, yoke with gathers, a hand-warmer pouch on front with asymmetric openings, branding above the left side of flat knit hemFitRegularWash careMachine wash cold inside out with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleach or wringTumble dry or flat dry in shadeWarm iron; Do not iron on decorationsCosy and soft on your skin this stylish hooded sweatshirt from wrangler will keep you warm in the winter chill and will soon become a wardrobe favourite.  Pair this with jeans and sneakers or use it as an extra layer when you're off out for your early morning run.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8” and chest 33”
